narrative_beat: A escravidão do sistema — pulsos humanos acorrentados por cadeias de dados dourados, a prisão sem grades que ninguém mais consegue ver

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: slightly elevated looking down at wrists and hands
shot.depth_of_field: wrists and chains in focus, street background blurred

subject.primary: two human wrists in warm amber skin tones bound together by glowing golden digital chains, the chains composed of data-link segments that dissolve into floating data streams at their ends
subject.focal_point: the contact point of chain links against the wrist skin where crimson light bleeds through
subject.secondary: hands straining to pull apart, tension visible in muscles and tendons
props: golden digital chain links bound around both wrists
crimson light bleeding where chain presses against skin
chain ends dissolving into floating data streams
floating orange embers near the chain links

environment.location: urban street at night, city environment
environment.atmosphere: the invisible chains of digital dependency — the freedom we surrendered for convenience

composition.rule: centered close-up — wrists centered, chains as horizontal anchors, Ken Burns extremely slow pull-back to show they are in public space
composition.foreground: bound wrists in warm amber tones, golden chains glowing, crimson bleeding light
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white urban night street — pavement, building facades, streetlights stripped of warmth, pedestrian movement blurred

lighting.key_light: warm amber key light from above-left illuminating skin texture and muscle tension
lighting.fill_light: golden chain glow providing upward fill along the underside of wrists
lighting.rim_light: crimson light from the chain-skin contact points providing warm rim on wrist edges
lighting.mood: the beautiful prison, chains that look like jewelry until you try to remove them

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: the quiet desperation of someone realizing they cannot simply walk away — the digital chains are real

symbolism.primary: digital chains represent the control system of Revelation — you cannot buy or sell without the mark, without the chain
symbolism.secondary: chains dissolving into data streams shows the new captivity is informational — your data is your chain

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
